CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, value VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test value');
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, test_id INT, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO another_table (id, test_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'related value');
SELECT a.value FROM test_table a JOIN another_table b ON a.id = b.test_id WHERE b.description = 'related value';
WITH empty_vector AS (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL) SELECT * FROM empty_vector;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (id INT, vector_content VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO complex_table (id, vector_content) VALUES (1, 'first vector'), (2, 'second vector');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_table WHERE vector_content LIKE '%vector%';
UPDATE complex_table SET vector_content = 'updated vector' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT vector_content FROM complex_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM complex_table);
SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT test_id FROM another_table WHERE description LIKE '%value%');
CREATE TABLE vector_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, content JSON);
